message:
feat(abi): wordexp syntax scan + fts_* traversal + source-scan exceptions

crates/frankenlibc-abi/build.rs (+118):
 - `type SourceScanExceptions = BTreeMap<String, BTreeMap<String, BTreeSet<String>>>`:
   three-level table keyed by module -> function -> symbol set.
 - `load_source_scan_exceptions(profile)`: parses the replacement
   profile's `/detection_rules/source_scan_exceptions` array so the
   source-scan phase can whitelist known-safe upstream symbol
   references. Used by the guard that blocks accidental
   reintroductions of glibc-only code paths.

crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/unistd_abi.rs (+798):
 wordexp surface:
  - `struct WordexpSyntaxScan`: carries the per-character scan
    result (inside-single-quotes, inside-double-quotes, brace
    depth, tilde-pending, etc.).
  - `scan_wordexp_syntax(&[u8]) -> WordexpSyntaxScan`: syntax
    recognizer matching glibc's wordexp() WRDE_SYNTAX checks.

 fts_* family (file-tree traversal):
  - `fts_path_bytes`, `fts_path_to_cstring`, `fts_name_bytes`:
    path-to-bytes helpers with the right C-string layout.
  - `fts_controlled_entry(control, entry)`: applies the FTS_SET
    instruction (FTS_AGAIN, FTS_FOLLOW, FTS_SKIP) to an FTSENT.
  - `fts_stat_entry(...)`: stats a directory entry and populates
    the FTSENT with the right FTS_F/FTS_D/FTS_SL classification.
  - FtsStream wrapper: `new`, `entry`, `entry_mut`, `as_mut_ptr`,
    `as_ptr`, `same_ptr`, `internal`.
  - `fts_read_dir_paths(&Path) -> Result<Vec<PathBuf>, c_int>`:
    reads a directory's children into a sorted list.
  - `fts_expand_pending_children(stream)` +
    `fts_build_children_list(...)`: populates the pending children
    list for the next fts_children call.
  - `pub unsafe extern "C" fn fts_children(ftsp, options) -> *mut FTSENT`:
    public C entry point returning the head of the children list.
  - `pub unsafe extern "C" fn fts_set(ftsp, f, instr) -> c_int`:
    public C entry point recording an instruction for the next
    fts_read return.

crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/signal_abi.rs (+7): small adjustment to
match the scanf/signal dispatch in frankenlibc_conformance.

crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/io_internal_abi.rs (+122): additional
internal-IO plumbing for the printf Double/Long support that
landed upstream.

crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/unistd_abi_test.rs (+494):
 New regression cases for wordexp syntax scan and fts_* traversal,
 plus edge cases for the I/O helpers.
